

Question
========
Using `%>%`, write (in one line) how you would compute the squared variance of the column `bmi` inside `health`, assuming `bmi` exists.


Solution
========

The correct code is `health$bmi %>% var() %>% sqrt()`.

Meta-information
================
exname: Arithmetic
extype: str
exsolution: `health %>% pull(bmi) %>% var()`
extol: 0.01
